name: vuln-scan
description: Autonomous vulnerability scanning pipeline for code repositories
author: pr0digy

skills.name: vuln-scan
skills.description: Scan a code repository for security vulnerabilities. Runs an 8-phase pipeline: recon, threat model, static analysis, LLM code review, dependency scan, secret detection, validation, and reporting. Produces markdown + SARIF output in .vuln-scan/.
